calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-14-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ray Vasallo for Plaintiff/Respondent Service Master Clean of San Francisco/San Mateo.
Linda Cooks, Defendant/Appellant, appear in pro per.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Ray Vasallo testifies on behalf of Service Master Clean of San Francisco/San Mateo. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1 - Journal Dated 11/29/07
Exhibit 2 - Journal Dated 12/1/07

Linda Cooks, Appellant/Defendant testifies on her own behalf. Appellant submits docuemtary evidence identified as Exhibit A - Restoration Management Company - Equipment Usage Charges & Various Photographs.

At the conclusion of the hearing the matter is taken under submission.

JPT Richard Wise, Clerk Clark Banayad, not reported (525)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-10-2009 Granted Per Written Order

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-06-2008 Judgment Entered
